title: Supply Chain Manager - AFL Logistics - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - AFL Logistics - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Join the AFL Logistics family as a Supply Chain Manager in Ranchi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About AFL Logistics:
AFL Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AFL Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
